results.definition_en: On the side of the body where the heart is.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 左邊的、左方的;心臟所在的身體一側。
results.example_en: Take the road to the left.

results.definition_en: Not held tight; able to move.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鬆的、寬鬆的;未被綁緊、可活動的。
results.example_en: The button is loose on my coat.

results.definition_en: Making much noise; not quiet.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 響亮的、大聲的;聲響大、非安靜的。
results.example_en: The music is too loud for me.

results.definition_en: Near the ground; not high.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 低的;靠近地面、非高的。
results.example_en: The shelf is too low for the books.

results.definition_en: Made of more than one kind put together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 混合的、混雜的;由多種事物合成的。
results.example_en: She has mixed feelings about the move.
results.example_zh_tw: 她對搬家有複雜的感覺。

results.definition_en: Not wide; small from one side to the other.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 窄的、狹窄的;兩側距離小的。
results.example_en: The path is narrow and steep.

results.definition_en: Having had many years; not new.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 老的、舊的;歲月已久、非新。
results.example_en: She has an old dog and a young cat.
results.example_zh_tw: 她有一隻老狗和一隻小貓。

results.definition_en: On the other side; or having a very different sense.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 相反的、對立的;位於另一側或意義截然不同。
results.example_en: The school is on the opposite side of the road.

results.definition_en: Open to all the people; not private.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 公眾的、公開的;對所有人開放、非私人的。
results.example_en: The library is a public place.

results.definition_en: Not smooth; with bumps or unevenness.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 粗糙的、不平的;表面有起伏、非平滑。
results.example_en: The bark of the tree is rough.

results.definition_en: Feeling sorrow; not happy.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 悲傷的、難過的;心情低落、非快樂。
results.example_en: She was sad when her dog died.
results.example_zh_tw: 她的狗過世時她很傷心。

results.definition_en: Not in danger; free from harm.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 安全的;不處於危險中、免受傷害。
results.example_en: Keep the keys safe in your pocket.
results.example_zh_tw: 把鑰匙好好放在口袋裡。

results.definition_en: Not made known to others.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 祕密的、不公開的;不為他人所知的。
results.example_en: She has a secret place for her notes.
results.example_zh_tw: 她有個藏筆記的祕密地點。

results.definition_en: Of little length; not long.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 短的;長度小、非長的。
results.example_en: She has short brown hair.

results.definition_en: Closed; not open.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 關上的、關閉的;已合上、非開的。
results.example_en: The door is shut against the cold.

results.definition_en: Easy to do or take in; not complex.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 簡單的、簡易的;易於完成或理解、非複雜。
results.example_en: She made a simple meal for the children.
results.example_zh_tw: 她為孩子們做了簡單的一餐。

results.definition_en: Taking much time; not fast.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 慢的、緩慢的;耗時長、非快的。
results.example_en: The walk is slow and pleasant.

results.definition_en: Of little size; not big.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 小的;尺寸小、非大的。
results.example_en: She bought a small bag for her trip.

results.definition_en: Easy to press; not hard.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 軟的、柔軟的;易被擠壓、非硬的。
results.example_en: The cushion is soft and warm.

results.definition_en: Firm and hard; not liquid or gas.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 固體的、堅固的;堅實的，非液或氣態。
results.example_en: Ice is solid water.

results.definition_en: Different from the rest; for a special use.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 特別的、特殊的;與一般不同、有特定用途。
results.example_en: Today is a special day for her.
results.example_zh_tw: 今天對她來說是特別的一天。

results.definition_en: Not seen before; not like the usual.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 奇怪的、陌生的;前所未見、與往常不同。
results.example_en: A strange man came to the door.
results.example_zh_tw: 一個陌生男人到了門口。

results.definition_en: Of little measure from one side to the other; not thick.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 薄的、瘦的;雙側距離小、非厚的。
results.example_en: The ice is too thin to walk on.

results.definition_en: Of the colour of milk or new snow.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 白色的;如牛奶或新雪之色。
results.example_en: She has a white cat with green eyes.

results.definition_en: Not right or true; in error.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 錯誤的、不對的;不正確或有誤的。
results.example_en: The answer on the paper is wrong.
